response.overview: Deanna, an ambitious and competitive music publisher who wants to realize the perfect wedding celebration – with the perfect wedding planner, catering, food, and also a wedding band. A shocking worst-case scenario occurs when her fiancé decides to call off their engagement! Deanna decides to continue with the wedding while searching for anyone to be her groom. Thus begins a comedy story about how this bride-to-be continues her efforts to find the perfect man for her dream wedding, with two willing candidates to be her husband – her wedding planner, Khai, and his employee, Mat, who aspires to become a musician.
response.title: Ijab Kabut
